description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that defines a test stage and a deploy stage, uses PHP Docker images 8.1‑8.4 for test jobs and a node:16 image for a pages job, and sets a global XDEBUG_MODE=coverage variable. In the test stage add four jobs named test:8.1, test:8.2, test:8.3, test:8.4 each with a before_script that updates apt, installs git zip unzip, installs Xdebug version ${XDEBUG_VERSION} via pecl, enables it, installs Composer, runs composer install, downloads php‑cs‑fixer v3.15.1, makes it executable, and runs ./php‑cs‑fixer --allow-risky=yes -v --dry-run fix on config, database, src, and tests; each job caches the vendor/ directory, sets PHP_CS_FIXER_IGNORE_ENV=1 and the appropriate XDEBUG_VERSION (3.3.1 for 8.1‑8.3, 3.4.0 for 8.4), then executes php vendor/bin/phpunit --coverage-text --coverage-clover clover.xml --testdox followed by bash <(curl -s https://codecov.io/bash). In the deploy stage add a pages job that runs only on the master branch, uses the node:16 image, caches node_modules/, runs yarn install then yarn build, and publishes the resulting public/ directory as a pages artifact. Ensure no services are defined and artifacts are configured as described.
